title: Fungal Outbreak
description: A deadly fungus has started to spread in the world. It starts out as a small relatively harmless mushroom. This mushroom has the ability to wipe out the entire world. What will you do when the fungal infection reaches the creatures of the world?
body:
# Fungal Outbreak by ForgeLabs ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
A deadly fungus has started to spread in the world. It starts out as a small relatively harmless mushroom. This mushroom has the ability to wipe out the entire world. What will you do when the fungal infection reaches the creatures of the world?
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png) ![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
### Notice Shaders and Resource Packs are supported out of the box. Go to Options > Video Settings > Shaderpacks and choose a shader to use. If any mods are missing from the video, report them on our discord server in a ticket.
![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
### Socials


![Forge Labs Divider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83f327701a64468e9152ecf2450c0ef1be54a3f.png)
